title: ACADX – Enterprise Resource Planning System
tag: Seamless access to your enterprise's potential.
description: ACADX is an academic ERP system designed for Schools, Colleges, and Polytechnic institutions to manage attendance, academic scores, and administrative workflows efficiently. It provides modules for attendance tracking, MSBTE-compatible score management, and digital NOC processing, along with AI-powered reports and export features. The system improves transparency, reduces administrative workload, and enables seamless collaboration among students, faculty, HODs, and staff through a responsive web platform.

title: Synedra AI
description: Synedra AI is an agentic multi-AI marketing strategy system that autonomously debates, decides, and executes end-to-end marketing strategies. Instead of relying on a single AI model, it uses a council of specialized agents (such as Trend, Brand, Risk, Engagement, and CMO agents) that analyze trends, evaluate risks, and generate platform-specific content strategies. The system employs structured debate and reasoning between agents to reach strategic decisions and continuously improves through a feedback loop using real engagement analytics.

title: RePlate – AI-Driven Smart Surplus Food Redistribution
tag: Connecting surplus food to consumers while reducing carbon emissions and food waste.
description: RePlate is an AI-powered marketplace platform that connects restaurants, bakeries, and grocery stores with nearby consumers to redistribute surplus food before it expires. The system uses AI-driven demand forecasting, smart dynamic pricing, and location-based discovery to recommend discounted surplus food to users. If items remain unsold, the platform intelligently redirects them to nearby NGOs with optimized pickup routes, reducing food waste and improving food accessibility.

title: NyayaSearch – Discover Indian Law with AI Precision
tag: Discover Indian Law with AI Precision.
description: NyayaSearch is an AI-powered legal search platform designed to help lawyers, law students, and researchers efficiently discover Indian legal information. The system enables advanced search of legal resources using filters such as keywords, court names, and dates, while also providing a live legal news feed for staying updated with recent developments. Powered by large language models, the platform improves legal research by delivering more accurate and context-aware results through an intuitive web interface.

title: RespireX – AI-Powered Lung Disease Detection
tag: AI-driven early detection for accessible lung healthcare.
description: RespireX is an AI-powered healthcare platform designed to detect lung diseases from chest X-ray images quickly and accurately. The system uses deep learning models to analyze X-rays and identify potential abnormalities, enabling early diagnosis and reducing reliance on expensive diagnostic methods such as CT scans and biopsies. It features an interactive dashboard that allows doctors and patients to upload X-rays, view AI-generated predictions, and access visual insights.

title: SmartPlate – AI-Driven Canteen Management & Food Recommendation
tag: AI-driven smart canteen platform for personalized food discovery and demand forecasting.
description: SmartPlate is an AI-powered mobile-first platform designed to modernize campus canteen operations through intelligent food discovery, personalized dish recommendations, and machine learning-based demand forecasting. The system connects students, vendors, and administrators through dedicated interfaces that enable real-time menu updates, food ordering, and operational insights.

title: Meta-Shield – AI-Powered Sensitive Document Classification
tag: Privacy-preserving AI classification using document metadata.
description: Meta-Shield is an AI-powered document classification system that identifies whether a file is Sensitive or Non-Sensitive using only file metadata, without analyzing document content. The platform leverages a Random Forest machine learning model to analyze metadata attributes such as file name, size, type, and timestamps, enabling privacy-preserving classification with confidence scoring.

title: Nexus – AI-Powered Git Commit Assistant
tag: AI-powered commit generation for smarter developer workflows.
description: Nexus is a terminal-native AI-powered developer assistant that converts natural language descriptions of code changes into structured Conventional Git commit messages. It can automatically analyze staged, unstaged, and untracked git diffs through @auto mode to generate accurate commit messages without manual formatting. Designed to be safe and non-intrusive — Nexus never executes commands automatically.

title: Redactum – AI-Powered Writing Enhancement Toolkit
tag: AI-powered text refinement with intelligent tone and quality control.
description: Redactum is an AI-powered writing enhancement toolkit designed to refine and improve text through intelligent grammar correction, tone adjustment, and structural optimization. Available as a terminal CLI application, a web interface, and a lightweight Go-based CLI. Supports 10 tone variations and integrates with multiple AI providers.

title: OpenCode Chat Interaction – AI Gateway
tag: AI gateway tool for multi-agent development and LLM communication.
description: An AI gateway that enables Python applications to interact with AI models through a Node.js gateway server while mirroring the TypeScript @opencode-ai/sdk API. Provides both a low-level Python SDK for direct session control and a high-level agent framework with persistent memory, conversation history, and multi-agent support.

title: OrgCanvas – Organization Chart Maker
tag: Interactive organizational hierarchy visualization from Excel data.
description: A Flask-based web application that allows users to create, edit, and visualize organizational hierarchies using Excel data. Supports Excel import/export, live editing, and automatic validation to prevent circular references. Features interactive chart with zoom/pan, collapsible nodes, drag-and-drop reassignment, and department-based color coding.

title: SnapGrid – Photo Arranger
tag: Drag, drop, and arrange photos into PDF layouts.
description: A web-based photo arrangement tool that allows users to organize, edit, and export photo collections into professionally formatted PDF layouts. Provides an intuitive drag-and-drop interface, built-in image editor with cropping, rotation, and color adjustments, real-time PDF preview, customizable paper sizes, and watermarking support.
